case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. BRENNAN NEWSOM

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER. DEFENDANT SHALL APPEAR TO SHOW PROOF OF DISCHARGE IN BAKRUPTCY. FILED BY BRENNAN NEWSOM ON JAN-07-2011 - DENIED. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES; NO PROOF OF DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2010 - CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT.
